title: Oceanside Roofing
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Mary H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5hNlaM-Nq1JAOcnmqNrGVfYCpLzPkOO6H24L8nAj4_F09twk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm sharing details about my excellent, reroofing experience this month.  Paul and Lorelie are the owners of Oceanside Roofing and work as an incredible team providing seamless coordination of all the installation phases. Their professional communication is always prompt and helpful.  I contacted Paul 2 years ago for an evaluation of  my 19 year old shingles.  He provided a completely, honest inspection at no charge stating that the shingles didn't need replacing yet.  This April he did another evaluation indicating that there was more granule loss at 21 years, so I decided to obtain a quote to proceed with reroofing at a very fair price.  In addition, my home insurance only covers the roof for 20 years.   The efficient, skilled crew arrived  to complete the work.  Chris, Dano, and Darryl  demonstrated impeccable workmanship from start to finish, including a thorough clean-up at the end of every day.  My new roof is very impressive!  Ultimately, I highly recommend Oceanside Roofing for all your roofing needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"W “Crazymom” B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpyyCduAG2XbLlm2KmjsOANcLU4WhqQKmt3GMsV79tKICytg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very happy with our decision of  choosing Oceanside for our new roof. Our house is approximately 23 years old and we knew the time was coming near to replace the roof. Oceanside had done many of the houses in our strata and came highly recommended!  After an initial inspection, we  received a list of other places in the area so we could see the design and colour choices on real homes. This was very helpful to make our choice, much better than just looking at a sample. Once we made our decision, the shingles and supplies were delivered quickly. Due to the weather conditions it was a couple of weeks before work could actually begin, but once they got started, it was done quickly, efficiently, and not a trace of any type of mess. Some small water damage was found to the plywood underneath, which was very quickly fixed and replaced at a very low cost. We are very happy with how the house looks, there was great communication as to when the bin was going to be delivered, and when work would begin. we would definitely recommend this company.  The price may be a bit higher than some of the companies, but we feel it is worth it as an investment in our house.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I highly recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlea Tuck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmfJVrvDq9ZdwRXYvJOohA4ZgdHy5Jof8U3fgQxLmMvJ0S4A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When Andrew first came to meet us at our house, we were planning to sell our house and move and I didn't really think we would go through with renovations. Not only was Andrew great to work with, but all of the trades he hired were excellent as well.

Our biggest concerns going into a renovation were the discomfort of having people in our home and the mess. It was quickly clear that having Andrew and his team around would definitely not be a problem! It was just like having friends over all the time who happened to create some dust and noise. Andrew and his team were so good with our two young sons too, and we all made it through the renovation with what felt like really minimal disturbance to our lives. As for the mess, Andrew was meticulous about cleaning up after himself at the end of each day. Even on the days he wasn't on site, he would call or stop by at the end of the day to make sure everything was how it should be. His greatest concern was always our comfort and well being, even though he himself was working so hard.

If you are looking for a positive renovation experience (and a new friend) Andrew is your guy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M Guinn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxpVDZQe4RhuClo2t4-Nl5YGle0GnS7WrVtWzvVL0UOTUDPm-b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our roof was at the end of its life so after getting a few quotes we decided to go with Aspengrove and are happy with our decision. Read the reviews and had 3 different on site consults with 3 different companies. Midisland Gutters certainly outshined overall. Estimates coming in midline, consult accurately reflecting work done. I was pleased this all happened in a reasonable time frame as was of high concern going into winter monsoons and falling debris as an upper eave had given way. I appreciated the follow up by Gordon, giving me an opportunity to ask about condition of soffits and such. Job well done overall and I certainly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rick Cicchine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVoiOaKQYz-kBXtZMdEdhfooZZvzI5c4LaWE2J0VxANiAxX-U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recentnly had three gutters put on different parts of our home and could not have been more pleased with the work Gord and his crew completed for us. When I had a question about the installation that was done, Gord came out and took a look as soon as he was able.
We are so happy with the gutter work that when I found out Mid-Island does soffets as well, I had Gord come back to give us a quote. We highly recommend Mid-Island Gutters.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A I","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoszuRTozhZg0hA_eukyAdqQuTvXCiGfVgHXABJmFX5fQ4U3bU1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gord is very professional and skilled. Thank you Mid Island Gutters!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ruth Ervin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6jsIEVboufvuCgYm3ELrJxad2fjvwZp76irONTJqI_fScQVY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very pleased with the quality of work, the clean up and removal of old gutters, and the professionalism. If you need new gutters, I highly recommend Good and his crew at Mid Island Gutters.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard Jackson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnNsRw0ITBpq7LxkTAZF28XgbribaygVUVo-IF2SFUmO5QjyI-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very impressed how fast he came to look at our problem.
They were just plugged with moss, he cleaned them out.
We will have him replace these gutters a little later next year.

Thanks  Gord","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Graham Galipeau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJP7n0V32hkaDSWn0gMJ-eGE2EVp3j7wkLkydFVMBerAxl1sg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Have called twice for someone to call back for an estimate, two separate days . Three days have elapsed . No response. Just our luck on holiday before kids go back to school.

Five days have now passed, and received a callback from Gord apologizing for not getting back to us, as he and his family were away camping (no cell service). But called right away on a stat day and came to us the following day.

Gord Foley, very professional and knowledgeable. Gave us tips ie: BC Hydro and new building codes. Looking forward to the next step with working together 😀","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Naomi Cox","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKG6AwBCh7uA2nSCmB0YQaahHI8iKhQng-cd4a1V52W9XXppg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gord was very quick to respond to my email requesting a quote. He came the next day and was able to get me a quote  the following morning. Worked with what I needed and didn't try to up sell me.
Got half my gutters replaced the week after that. His crew were did an excellent job and were professional and friendly. Cleaned up everything after they were done and took the old gutters with them.
I'm very happy with how they turned out, you can barely see the seam where the two pieces meet, very seamless.
I will be getting the other half replaced by them in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eric Pratt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKkymhrxWySOOhwWV0XdB-g6bM31D3SnGWUcHw7MxZhvAQk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fast, friendly and efficient service. Gord is very professional and our go to gutter and soffit  maintenance and service company.","Images":null,"When":""}]

There are few details I had to be rectify since and hopefully Aurora’s crews can improve on them in future. The end flashings where the barge boards project past the end of the gutters created a pocket for debris to collect in and cause damage to the ends of the barge boards. Also where one roof line and gutter is above another, the bottom of the upper gutter sits on the lower roof resulting in a collection point for debris that washes down the valley where the two roofs meet. title: RECOVERY ROOFING
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mark Foster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_SMu7uC7EFavNEwN-bkJgHGuuevFtgNCS7wM_u10AAljbIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 STARS!!!! I couldn’t be more impressed with the work Mitch from Recovery Roofing did on my home. His attention to detail is on a completely different level, and it shows in every part of the job. Mitch doesn’t just “install a roof”—he builds it to last. He future-proofs against shingle failure by making sure every vent and flashing is protected, with no seams and no nails placed too close to those vulnerable areas. He even adjusts the stagger so each flashing and vent is fully covered by a complete shingle, not a cut piece.
In all the high water-flow areas, he sealed every fastener with Geocel 4500, and ensured there are zero seams in any of the problematic spots other roofs typically fail. He also reinstalled our bathroom exhaust pipes correctly with higher-quality materials and better tape—something no previous roofer had bothered to do. There are no exposed fasteners anywhere except the self-sealing rubber-grommet screws, and he even hand-crafted custom folded flashings to make sure water is directed exactly where it should go.
It’s rare to find someone who takes this level of pride in their workmanship. If you want a roof done right, done once, and built to outlast the shingles themselves, Mitch is the guy you want on your roof. Absolutely five stars.
Thank you Mitch for all your hard work","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxegKF3wSRbPxTAHa2QtfB&fid=0x0:0x337901a930153f8c"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"Melissa Hall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIK4yy3a9HuihOYWapMA-cuhFzXmVmsNU3gR4cBda6c9m80Zg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just had Recovery Roofing do our roof. [{"Name":"Barry MacLennan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcDIOUOKuTUtkMSnx7wKH__7YnisKDIU0beMuosxVmtQqk5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Carmana to conduct renovations to our 20-year old house, specifically the kitchen and both the ensuite and main bathrooms. Carmana principals Paul and Jillian did all the design work for the main bathroom based on our wants and needs, and they helped select materials and finishes for the whole project, confirming our own ideas and finishing choices, but also steering us gently towards what would look and function best if we were "not quite there yet". The decision-making took a matter of a few short hours. Procurement of a few items and the construction itself were delayed briefly due to the Covid-19 situation, but everything ran substantially to schedule. The project was completed within what we thought was a very reasonable time considering its complexity. The quality of the finished work is outstanding, and we could not be happier with the results! We feel we received excellent value for the money we spent, though the project was not inexpensive. The house looks and feels up-to-date, and it all works beautifully. Importantly, we found Paul and his crews and subcontractors not only technically excellent but also eminently easy to deal with, honest, straightforward, reliable, tidy, and clean. We never had anything to clean up after the crew had finished their day's work. They always showed up on time, when they said they would, and went about their work as quietly as possible. They were also extremely understanding of--and always accommodated--our need for predictability, so that we could run our lives with minimal negative impact from the construction.  In summary, we have absolutely no qualms about giving our highest possible recommendation to Carmana for projects of this kind and scope. Congratulations Carmana on a project so very, very well done!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDazumHRw&fid=0x0:0x637886b0dd019822"],"When":"2021-8-21"},{"Name":"Pat Gibbings","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIaRjEpS5B4HB7FmkwtME2uNLynDQ9WbTgi6nNtE_WSnjMGIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Carmana Home Improvements do some renovations to our home in Parksville. Jillian's input by being available to shop for tiles etc.with us made a great difference.We relied on her feedback before making many decisions.Both Paul and Jillian are prompt to answer texts and calls.
All of the crew who worked here were pleasant and easy to be around.They were proficient and knowledgeable and Paul was here frequently to check on progress.
One expects a few bumps along the road of renovation..but we believe that having Paul with his particular combination of professionalism and communication skills has made our journey mainly a stress free one.

We would definitely recommend them!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nic N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSSqGFoLRDTKDBiOZF2gd5qzaZBXxh-xeT98qlqStZ5jb4tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We needed our entire roof replaced, as well as my gutters. Through word of mouth, Erickson Roofing was recommended, so we decided to contact them.
Yanick is very professional and dedicated. He was always quick to respond if we had any questions or concerns and kept me updated on things. We wanted to replace my workshop roof as well, but he recommended waiting 10 years, as that roof is newer than the roof on my home. We were very impressed!
Roofer Murray and his team did an outstanding job. They replaced 20 pieces of plywood and explained why the original plywood rotted. The cleanup after each workday was outstanding as well. New roof and gutters are absolutely stunning, and fully functional. This is a top notch, top quality roofing company. Keep in mind, that due to COVID, suppliers are running behind on inventory, so you may have to wait a little while for certain items. This is not the fault of the roofing company.
Thank you Erickson Roofing, for helping my family and I.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Wood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKp71uSKH-0JEfoaztM5JJdwbyHnOYrfnYycVIAYnN7IaucmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I contacted Erickson Roofing to replace our roof. We had used Erickson Roofing over 20 years ago for a new roof on a previous house and were very pleased with the result then. Yanick came out a day or two after contact and gave us an estimate. We were very happy with the price and from my favourable experience 20 years ago, did not bother to get another estimate. We were made aware that there would be a slight delay in starting due to supply issues as a result of Covid. Murray and Dakota were the main roofers for our job and were both excellent. Everything in the process was well communicated and they all did and excellent job with our new roof.
We are extremely pleased with the final result. There were no surprises and I am still as happy with Erickson Roofing as I was 20 years ago. Nothing less than 5 stars.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We received our quote - which was talked through with care and kindness. All questions were answered honestly and explained in detail. No egos or attitudes, just kindness and respect.

As we watched Erwin working, it seemed like it was his own home he was working on - that’s how careful and precise he approached everything.

As the job was coming to completion we couldn’t believe how incredible our beloved home looked.

When the job was finished we walked the property with Erwin - and shared our happiness and gratitude.

‘Top of Ladder’ exceeded our expectations on every level and we feel we have gained a valued friendship as well as a trusted partner to help with keeping our home at its finest.

Dan at Best on Top came and gave the place a proper assessment and did some work to try to patch thinga up during a rainy couple of weeks last year.  It helped but didn't entirely solve the problem in the short term. They came back last week after learning it was still an issue, and they finally solved this issue!  My most positive feedback is reserved for the roofer Adrian.  He was simply incredible.  He was so respectful of our business needs, so fun to deal with in the midst of this tough time, always going the extra mile, and keeping communication open. His sense of humour, his old school values of respect, common sense and plain kindness were hugely appreciated. Thanks to Best on Top for being the best. And thanks to Adrian for being the best of the best!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ron Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3vzB6OOun8nfa2WU2M0v06Ww9X7bneouXSn2gOPS5Rg61cVj7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sales consultant Caroll Swartz showed up at our door in the last week of May offering a free roof inspection. He was different from those who came before. He spent time up on the roof taking photos and video. And he asked to check inside the attic! That was a first. A couple of days later he returned with ‘the boss’ Dan Perpeluk, owner of Best On Top Roofing, taking measurements and more photos with his drone. The two of them sat with us, explained the reroofing process and options, and clearly answered all our questions and addressed our concerns.

We had three priorities.
1) A high quality roof we could depend on to protect us from west coast rain and wind.
The GAF High Performance Roofing System and warranties is what we needed.
2) Experienced, professional installers, that take pride in their work.
The Maximum Roofing team of Adrian and Jason worked to the highest standards.
3) Completion before Marie’s knee replacement July 30th.
Despite a challenging July heat wave, the job was completed on schedule July 26th!

You met all of our priorities.
You kept all of your promises.
The finished product is superb and we are delighted.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChoqRuEzB1mpcJ8cnMAtmj&fid=0x0:0xc2c3c9e303d9ae3"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"mookamoose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaKK83q2fyCqkv2KUMkDttzYaaTCzrIorEbT46jg7xztlObiE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dan and his team were recommended to me and I am SO glad they were !!!   They showed up for the initial consult in days !!  Spent so much time in my kitchen with me , explaining things !!! It felt like we were old friends ! The roofing crew were wonderful!!!!! They cleaned everything up immaculately!!!  My house looks brand new !!! I have been telling Everyone I know about them !!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCEwqpXfAXsOw2690YpT4Le&fid=0x0:0xc2c3c9e303d9ae3"],"When":"2025-6-25"},{"Name":"Philip P (DjFIL007)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQWEPz2JwE3w0hGi-N7YTK26jWVME6axOsrQ0oVC80MK9QPNw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Previously posted as a 5-star review, now revised due to multiple after-install concerns that have come up. I still will stand by the high quality materials that was used during the install and the original install project was completed in a timely fashion. However... there was concerns found that delayed warranty certification, week or so later they sent someone back early morning with ZERO WARNING they're up on our roof again, opening a skylight they never installed properly and other small items noticed. Company owner tells me the person HE SENT to review the work exaggerates issues frequently... and few weeks later we get another half day of work to finish the job. We did eventually get the warranty certificate, but all the information on it (even the basic address) was incorrect. Multiple attempts to get replies and have this corrected, it feels like we're being ghosted. For a company who's sales pitch stated they'd be there not just before and during the work, but also after, they're falling short of the expectations of their premium priced service and product.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rick Hyne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBy9MjDhIRDWov5r7I8DhuGupno-riXDFcvegb0Yf6nazkR0XVMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Last year we called around and received quotes from three roofing companies but decided not to move forward.

This year we returned to those companies for a requote, but none of them called back.

Then we called Best on Top Roofing.  The response was immediate.

Three week later we had their crew on our roof not only replacing our shingles, but repaired/replaced our sheathing due to years of leaking.

The crew had many, many years of experience and did what needed to be done to make it a great install.

We even had our shed redone to match the roof.

The final bill was as proposed. No "didn't you know" add-ons.

Great job guys.,","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDK0JrzGw&fid=0x0:0xc2c3c9e303d9ae3"],"When":"2021-4-27"},{"Name":"Vladimir Grigore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl8UCLup4DxxReFhw-kI8BP-n27uTpN13HVgtlNSSErbycvXrx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Best on Top is the most successful roofing company in the Nanaimo area, and sometimes success comes at a cost, as the overhead to manage several teams working across different projects at the same time can lead to challenges in managing timelines and communication with the end customer. However, their dedication to the customer makes up for it, and there is a reason the name Caroll Swartz shows up many times in these reviews. He will personally go the extra mile and make sure things will get done to the customer's satisfaction and get in front of any challenges arising during the project execution","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emmet Fields","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDmA2kEbZi87x9tg7dDJunuTfUIjOxvleOqp2X-arX1cgnng=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dan gave us a great deal on some GAF shingles and the turnaround from estimate to installation was about a week and a half (first set of sunny days). Estimate for price included ice & water shield and drip edge, whereas most other companies came in slightly above on price and didn't  include these.

Team came out, got to work, and were done in two days. Super satisfied with the work and the responsiveness of the company","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Eva Hansen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSq90HsGyiXyfK-wr78me2D-x40raUy80Js1OP-4CqqL3ssQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We purchased vinyl plank flooring from this store.  Their salesman  talks a good line about how he has great installers and recommended someone to do not just our flooring but also to replace our double shower stall in the bathroom.  We stupidly thought he would recommend someone who knew what they were doing.

We had 3 weeks of very short working days (sometimes only 3 hours) so the job was going on and on.  At the 3 week point, not one room in the house was finished.  There were bits and pieces of trim left undone, bits of wood with nails lying around….and then they didn’t show up at all one day.  We didn’t get even the courtesy of a phone call to let us know they would not be showing up. The 2nd time that happened in the same week, we’d had enough and told him it was over.  He said he was too busy to show up that day because he works for a strata - that’s more important. The way they treated our time showed a lack of respect.  He sent his son the next day to finish the hall…..see picture - 2 3/4” inches out in a short hallway…..kind of like the carnival fun house feeling when you go down the hall because it’s so crookedly laid.

To date we have spent almost $1200 on finishing and redoing.  And more to come - the big one with the floor having to be taken up in the hall and reinstalled.  And all trim having to be redone.

The carpet installer sent from the store sat here when she came to do the estimate and talked about how the last people she had worked for had not given her a big enough tip and she was not happy.  We’re getting carpeting from a flooring store in Parksville.  Someone else is doing our bathroom.

The salesman at the store does not seem too bothered at all by this.  I guess it’s business as usual.

After speaking to the salesman about this, my husband came home to tell me that the plants were all on sale in the garden centre.  But this business will not be getting another penny of my money.  And people in the neighborhood who have asked how the reno is going……well, you can imagine yourself whether they will give them a try.

This flooring department might be good if you are a do-it-yourselfer and do not rely on a solid (or even halfway good) recommendation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqGm_KCZykxz2On7QAntU1&fid=0x0:0xac7b176feaa561e6"],"When":"2025-6-23"},{"Name":"Richard Anvil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhQG6UEso3HvKpHGuY-km_GICbd-doe5vmkAbq6O6c4HCFqNE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Darrell made such a great impression on both my boss and I. He is helpful. Knowledgeable and goes above and beyond to help customers. He is one of a kind as a person and professional. Great Job  you made out experience amazing 😍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nnej","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_irOFMPfRO0obuzwoBjVVnUxKn2tqydT2ZdQ4I95BZBDRuw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I'm gonna start by saying that I love wondering around hardware stores looking at the crap I didn't know existed to aid my fantasy projects that I haven't started yet but what I don't love is being followed around or stared at by the paint guy or the guy stocking neither asking if I needed help but just giving the eyeball almost in disbelief that yeah I do have money and will be using it for the stuff in the basket don't be so judgmental home hardware staff  my clothes are dirty and look like a hot mess cause I work in the trades and it rained sideways all day. I don't need to steal your crap .. So I'll just drive further down the street where it's cheaper and not so obvious next time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Keelan Biegler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJ6RKVrT4V16Dl_HI2cW_P3sQOVVxNk_nY83964Nd9oSqKfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lots of knowledgeable staff willing to go out of their way to help, my first stop for anything to fix the house","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jess McQ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIOOL8PCdXFoCo26qQsCRgnjUci-nj-CpksE3bqO_6XOd9avA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"whilst looking for sanding pads an elderly gentleman offered me a toffee. When I said no thank you he made some very inappropriate comments to me as I was walking away. When I complained to the cashiers and pointed out who he was they replied with “oh yeah, he makes inappropriate comments all the time.” Maybe you shouldn’t allow people who sexually harass women in your store. I won’t be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JoniE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWD1p-pMqVHHjrQ3OnDPInE7dXhkRZzQKKiz4i6ItVvf4mNgrg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Staff aren't helpful.
